test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
index c447fa484359..73664c99daff 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
@@ -7587,12 +7587,23 @@ VectorizationFactor LoopVectorizationPlanner::computeBestVF() {
       BestPlan.getVectorLoopRegion() &&
       BestPlan.getVectorLoopRegion()->getSingleSuccessor() !=
           BestPlan.getMiddleBlock();
-  assert((BestFactor.Width == LegacyVF.Width || PlanForEarlyExitLoop ||
-          planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(BestFactor.Width),
-                                                CostCtx, OrigLoop) ||
-          planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(LegacyVF.Width),
-                                                CostCtx, OrigLoop)) &&
-         " VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed");
+  // Do not assert in debug builds if the new VPlan-based cost model and the
+  // legacy cost model disagree. This can legitimately happen if plans contain
+  // additional simplifications the legacy model doesn't account for, or due to
+  // corner cases the legacy model doesn't properly model. Emit a debug note
+  // instead to avoid crashing in assertion-enabled builds.
+  bool ModelsAgreeOrExplained =
+      (BestFactor.Width == LegacyVF.Width || PlanForEarlyExitLoop ||
+       planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(BestFactor.Width),
+                                             CostCtx, OrigLoop) ||
+       planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(LegacyVF.Width),
+                                             CostCtx, OrigLoop));
+  if (!ModelsAgreeOrExplained) {
+    LLVM_DEBUG(dbgs()
+               << "LV: VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed. "
+               << "Selected VF (VPlan): " << BestFactor.Width
+               << ", Selected VF (Legacy): " << LegacyVF.Width << "\n");
+  }
   assert((BestFactor.Width.isScalar() || BestFactor.ScalarCost > 0) &&
          "when vectorizing, the scalar cost must be computed.");
 #endif
